response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the provided lyrics for 'Airman ga Taosenai'. The speaker in the first half is Hakui Koyori, contradicting the reference JSON which incorrectly mentioned Okayu and Korone in the first scene. 2. JSON Usage: Lyrics for the song were fully utilized; the opening dialogue required 100% manual transcription. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are anchored strictly to vocal activations. Aggressive truncation was used during the song's fast-paced chorus. Included visual text for the game-themed character selection screen.

subtitles.original: ポストしてください！
subtitles.english: Please post about it!

subtitles.original: 目指せトレンド1位、よろしくだー！
subtitles.english: Aim for #1 trending, please!

subtitles.original: はい、ということでちょっと息が整ってないですけど
subtitles.english: Alright, so I'm a bit out of breath, but...

subtitles.original: さて、今年の生誕ライブテーマは
subtitles.english: anyway, this year's birthday live theme is...

subtitles.original: 『ゲームソングライブ』です！
subtitles.english: "Game Song Live"!

subtitles.original: これまでたくさんやってきた実況配信で一緒に遊んできた思い出のゲームや
subtitles.english: Songs from the games we played together in past streams and shared memories of,

subtitles.original: こよりが大好きなゲーム関連の楽曲をたくさん詰め込みました。
subtitles.english: and many songs from games that I personally love.

subtitles.original: 最後まで全力で楽しんでいってねー！
subtitles.english: Enjoy it with all your might until the end!

subtitles.original: ということで、1曲目は大好きなポケモンのXYZを歌わせていただきました！ねー！
subtitles.english: So, for the first song, I sang XYZ from my favorite Pokemon! Right!

subtitles.original: しゅくー！あー！
subtitles.english: Bam! Ah!

subtitles.original: 「俺はこいつと旅に出る」っていうことです。はい。
subtitles.english: "I'm going on a journey with this guy," as they say. Yes.

subtitles.original: Xでセトリ予想もね、みんなにたくさんしてもらってたんですけど
subtitles.english: I had everyone predict the setlist on X,

subtitles.original: ポケモンの予想は結構多かったけど
subtitles.english: and while there were many Pokemon predictions,

subtitles.original: XYZ当てられてる人は結構少なかったです。
subtitles.english: very few people actually guessed XYZ.

subtitles.original: 当たった君、おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Congrats to those who got it right!

subtitles.original: ま、この曲は、ま、ZAが発売になったっていうのもあるんですけど
subtitles.english: Well, this song, partly because Pokémon Legends: Z-A was announced,

subtitles.original: 歌詞がめっちゃ良くて、実はこよりにもぴったりな曲なので選びました。
subtitles.english: but the lyrics are so good and it's actually perfect for me, so I chose it.

subtitles.original: さあ、この後も自分の予想が当たってるかなーって
subtitles.english: Now, please keep enjoying while wondering if your predictions will come true,

subtitles.original: ドキドキしながら楽しんでいってください。
subtitles.english: filled with excitement.

subtitles.original: 新3Dお披露目もあるからね！絶対に最後まで見てってね！
subtitles.english: There's also a new 3D reveal! Make sure to watch until the end!

subtitles.original: それでは、そろそろ次の曲、ゲームの世界へ、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Now then, it's about time for the next song. Into the game world, here you go!

subtitles.original: [キャラ選択画面]
subtitles.english: [Character Selection Screen]

subtitles.original: [アンロック！]
subtitles.english: [Unlock! ????]

subtitles.original: 気がついたら同じ面ばかりプレイ
subtitles.english: When I realize it, I'm playing the same level,

subtitles.original: そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
subtitles.english: and I always die in the same place.

subtitles.original: 諦めずに消える足場に挑戦するけど
subtitles.english: I don't give up and try the disappearing platforms, but

subtitles.original: すぐに下に落ちるよ
subtitles.english: I fall right down.

subtitles.original: アイテム2号があれば楽に向こうの岸まで着くけど
subtitles.english: If I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other side, but...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Airman!

subtitles.original: あの竜巻何回やっても避けれない
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try to avoid that tornado, I can't.

subtitles.original: うしろに回って撃ち続けてもいずれは風に飛ばされる
subtitles.english: Even if I go behind and keep shooting, eventually I get blown away by the wind.

subtitles.original: タイム連打も試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I tried hitting the button repeatedly, but

subtitles.original: 竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い
subtitles.english: it's useless against the tornado.

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, next time, to win for sure,

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save my E-Can until the very end.

subtitles.original: 気がついたらライフももう少ししかない
subtitles.english: When I realize it, I have only a little life left,

subtitles.original: そしていつもそこでE缶使う
subtitles.english: and I always use my E-Can there.

subtitles.original: 諦めずにエアーマンまでたどり着くけれど
subtitles.english: I don't give up and reach Airman, but

subtitles.original: すぐに残機なくなる
subtitles.english: I immediately run out of lives.

subtitles.original: リーフシールドがあれば楽にエアーマンを倒せるけど
subtitles.english: If I had the Leaf Shield, I could easily defeat Airman, but...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: ウッドマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Woodman!

subtitles.original: 落ちる木の葉は何回やっても避けれない
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try to avoid the falling leaves, I can't.

subtitles.original: 後に下がって距離をとってもいずれは距離を詰められる
subtitles.english: Even if I step back and keep my distance, eventually I get cornered.

subtitles.original: タイム連打も試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I tried hitting the button repeatedly, but

subtitles.original: あいつのジャンプはくぐれない
subtitles.english: I can't get past his jumps.

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対勝つために
subtitles.english: So, next time, to win for sure,

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save my E-Can until the very end.

subtitles.original: アイテム2号があれば楽に向こうの岸まで着くけど
subtitles.english: If I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other side, but...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Airman!
